title: Activity feed scoped to user's accessible resources
scenario_context: User feed shows events on resources they can access.
verification_chain: Layer 3: feed query scopes rows and total count
reasoning: Resource ACL applied to event query.

error_handling_strategy.server_errors: 403 for direct activity fetch outside role scope
error_handling_strategy.client_error_mapping: Filtered feed with explicit empty state when all rows are hidden
error_handling_strategy.user_facing_messages: No activity you can view
error_handling_strategy.recovery_actions: Refresh permissions or request access

test_strategy: Create activities for allowed and forbidden resources; verify feed rows, unread badges, counts, cursor pages, and exports exclude forbidden activity for every role.
observability_hooks: Track filtered_count, denied route, role, and tenant hash; alert on nonzero cross-tenant feed results.
